description:
Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1 + 2 revitalizes the classic arcade skateboarding experience with modernized visuals
and fluid mechanics, merging the original two titles into a single, seamless collection. Featuring an expanded
roster of professional skaters and a contemporary soundtrack, the game delivers enhanced environments and objectives
that reward creative combos and precise trick execution.

thps12-v1.0.0.description: _Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1 + 2 - A modern recreation of the classic trick-based skating games originally developed by Neversoft_ **Randomizer Features** - All 19 levels + 23 Skaters supported - Ability to select individual levels / skaters to include / exclude from generation - Ability to customize how many levels (8-19) / skaters (1-10) to play - Ability to set / randomize difficulty of target scores / combo scores. By level or globally - Each skater has their own ability progression and set of location checks - 14 unique traps to experience! - Scales well for all types of multiworlds: Short / Long Syncs, Asyncs; ~75-3250 checks - Ultra-rare variants of bobblehead filler items (that do nothing) to collect and brag about - Custom client UI that displays important information and updates in real-time. Includes a description for all gaps in the game! - No modding! The Archipelago client mods the game in real-time. No need to download / install / configure anything else - Universal Tracker (UT) fully supported (and recommended for guidance). YAML-free! - Feature-complete and expected to be very stable (Play-tested, 100,000 fuzzed generations with perfect outcome) **How it works and what to expect** - A custom campaign of X levels and Y skaters is generated based on your settings - You are granted 3 starting levels and 1 skater with which you can complete your first location checks - All skaters begin with severely limited capabilities: They start with 1 random trick type (e.g. Grabs, Grinds etc.) unlocked and all other abilities must be received as items - You progress through the campaign by receiving level / skater unlocks, as well as skater-specific abilities - You will also gather some secret tapes along the way. These are needed for both goal types. Either: - Collect N secret tapes to help gain access to a goal level, where you must score 1 million points to win - Collect N secret tapes to win - Progression is both horizontal and vertical, creating a dynamic where you must decide which level / skater combination to prioritize for efficiency - Since the UI is very hard to modify, you can go into locked levels or use locked skaters. That said, location checks will only count when meeting the proper requirements **Locations** - High / Pro / Sick Scores. Per Level - Platinum Scores. Optional - High Combos. Per Level - Pro / Sick Combos. Added by the mod. Per Level - Platinum Combos. Added by the mod. Per Level - Collecting each of the S-K-A-T-E letters. Per Level (that has them) - Collecting the Secret Tape. Per Level (that has them) - Landing Grinds / Lips / Manuals of a certain duration. Optional. Per Level. Duration will be random per trick type / level - Landing random gaps. Optional. Per Level. Can customize how many gap locations per level. Only unlocks when going back to the main menu (game limitation) - Landing each skater's signature specials. Can be done anywhere once the special meter is unlocked. Only unlocks when going back to the main menu (game limitation) **Items** - Level unlocks - Skater unlocks - Progressive Stats. Per Skater. 4 Stages: Nerfed (initial), Normal, Maxed and Bail Immunity - Flip Tricks. Per Skater. Flip tricks won't contribute to scoring until received - Grab Tricks. Per Skater. Grab tricks won't contribute to scoring until received - Progressive Grind Tricks. Per Skater. 3 Stages: No contribution to scoring (initial), Normal, Perfect Balance - Progressive Lip Tricks. Per Skater. 3 Stages: No contribution to scoring (initial), Normal, Perfect Balance - Progressive Manual Tricks. Per Skater. 3 Stages: Cannot initiate (initial), Normal, Perfect Balance - Progressive Special Meter. Per Skater. 3 Stages: Cannot accrue (initial), Normal, Doesn't reset on bail - Spin Tricks. Per Skater. Spins won't contribute to scoring until received - Transfers. Per Skater. Won't be able to perform transfers until received - Wallplants. Per Skater. Won't be able to perform wallplants until received - Extra Tricks. Per Skater. Won't be able to perform trick variants (AKA double-tap tricks) until received. Reverts are also considered to be extra tricks - Stance Switching. Per Skater. Won't be able to switch stances, including nollie position, until received - Double Score. Per Skater. The base score of every trick is doubled when received **Setup Guide:** [Here](https://github.com/SerpentAI/Archipelago/blob/thps12/worlds/tony_hawks_pro_skater_1_2/docs/setup_en.md)
thps12-v1.0.0.title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1 + 2 - 1.0.0
